h843e45f0gbb98g4e05gbf71g86717a211b00: Not sure what you did to piss off Mol. Don't want to know. Keep walking, scab.
hdff845fbgcedag4d8bg99bag1eaa6d0e265a: I still have no idea how you took my ring. Mol won't say it, but she's impressed.
hdc3bda6fgc12bg4ce4g9fbcg090d5430a9ed: Hells, you get everywhere, don't you?
h16aae179g6dbag4e4fg8554g9234920c5d69: I don't talk to dead scabs, scab. Keep moving.
h9f488dddg53a8g4bb0ga2dbg5663f72415d0: I'm sorry for taking your ring. Here you go.
he2d6e529g4c32g4376gb585gd677164cdc1f: Huh. Don't think anyone's ever apologised for stealing my stuff before.
h166dbff4g6e21g4772g8ca2gd4c017270a63: You know what? We're square. I'll tell the others to leave you alone too.
h77f6032fg1df5g4dc8g9d44g4a5c6ab7c85c: Don't worry about it. Now, you wanna buy something this time?
hc4247ff6gd85dg44d5gbb61gfd0d4cc19a9e: Well, grudges don't buy bread, and I gotta eat. Speaking of which, wanna trade?
hb5c5e97egb07bg4a7ag9ea4g964d4a1f8ec4: While I'm here, could we trade?
h877f4716g8d7eg4972g9682g1a5a6872a7a0: Keep moving, huh? I'm working here.
h731c9898gcc88g4d4fg9068gf7ef634e3eef: *You recognise his movements - Mol's hand signal.*
h64dfb0cbgebccg4327g9400g084da13b8c2b: Think you could stand back a ways, pal? I'm fishing for chumps here.
h4239ca16gd07fg4cdag86d0g512ef009b739: Hey there. You wanna buy one of my lucky rings? Bargain magic at good prices.
h3f337f0fg3c92g497eg87e5g71bf576c2eb1: Drop the act. I know about your little scam.
heacbcf90g67a9g45cbgbd7egc6444d329db7: But okay, fine. Get out of here. Make room for the chumps.
hba14e27bg8910g4c66g8ce5g6897c842e92a: Hey, you're back. Here to trade?
hb58497c3g480fg4fc1gbc5dg4f21eba33183: Uh, hey. You here to trade or...
hbcbee671gc811g4fe7gae05g001e35673e93: Yeah, I know. I was standing right here, telling her to rob you.
hd7fa7a6age7cdg4d8dga503g3b9d219a7d8d: I want an apology from her.
hfe48acb2g6d09g452eg87eagaa406c125e34: Want all you want. She's somewhere safe and staying that way.
h228d6c6ag23ccg4dacg8b47g417747a6a743: Look, you caught her. Good for you, you aren't a chump like everybody else around here.
h1717da02g6181g49afg95c1ge30d484f3051: Now, do me a favour. Make room for the chumps.
h6f64bdeeg513fg41cbg9819g8e584d2138e0: You could at least pretend to be sorry.
h5676625fgaf7eg4ae3gaae9g5d624877a783: I am sorry! Sorry we're still talking about this.
h34177e8egacc9g4c76gb376g95024889ad0d: You can make it right - by giving me a percentage of your take.
hf049d3e7g6a72g4ef8ga41bgbdfe3c8ac0e7: Fine. I'm not so good at counting, but I think any percentage of zero is zero.
h3612aebegaf4cg4376g9aaegf5260073b437: If you touch my pack again, I'll pull your horns off. Slowly.
h5a0b0702gaacfg4aa0gbf99g6497db4e3fb0: I- look, mister, it's nothing personal.
he1d80790g4137g4b9egac22g06e33eb7b603: I get it, you're not a chump, but we're just trying to survive.
h5c13635bge14eg4c19ga581g54a12360bcab: So move along, okay? Make room for the real chumps.
h0a7c3f87g64e6g48cag9694g39fd7aa2d82c: I should make you stand with your nose in the corner.
h9d9bd42bgf671g4f30g8c2eg72974550db1c: I'm bigger than you. You can't make me do anything.
h53f6659cg1d91g414ag91c4gfd140ec3d0bf: Careful. Not everyone is as forgiving as I am.
h6913b83eg15fcg438fgb2e4g5223d01a3b35: Mind where your little fingers wander, lest they find something that bites.
h87239548g2e86g4952g8e17g8959989decc7: I should remove one of your sister's fingers - as a lesson.
h2335e69cgf617g4088g930bgfe2ccd158c37: No! I mean- it's nothing personal, lady.
h3c989060gc80fg4c42gab32gab507e2a08e0: Thieves make poor slaves - until you break them, at least.
hebd20750g3b5eg4fc4g898dgc32a8a8b17e8: Hey! You're not taking any slaves here.
h5fc4d1edgbd26g41eegb7f3gad52ad934fa8: Have you no honour, hell child?
h8d224762g515eg435fga07agb62efac57905: Yeah, well, you can't eat honour.
hae2a4500gd0b6g45a2ga0d9g1494a49aaac1: Watch it. Where I'm from thieves are punished - harshly.
h59948620g9d94g42dega7f4g5b6ac1976c89: Oh yeah? Are they bored to death?
h18633941g3090g480fg908cgc4632627746b: Hey, you're back! Here to buy some stuff?
hd8472f91g1855g4d5agb2c4ge0bf11fec36a: Is there a larger entrance to the hideout?
h72b9bbd1g95c0g41aegacdcg4460cd434efc: Dunno. I just use the one I know.
hcd8aa6d4g53c9g44afg83c1gb6cc7a5e6ecb: Bet you can find another one, though. This place has tons of tunnels and stuff.
h0436a7e6geaf2g4963g9136g319855c15ae7: Have you taken something? Something that doesn't belong to you?
hdb2a1b0ega997g420cga9c9gcfb82d1c4e7b: Me? No, promise. I'm just a kid trying to make a living.
h4ea363e1ga0a2g49f1gae21ge7a6f27bea77: You know who you should talk to? Mol. She's my... boss, I guess. Good at finding stuff.
h71899c9dg9ccdg429eg8d02g599bbee7205b: Her office is through the crack in the wall over there, if you can fit.
hdf566f13g32c9g4adcg8a50g81e2bf2fb714: We've met. She told me to leave.
h020fcd79g8cbbg45faga013ga76169ade8f1: I know, but you didn't have business with her then. Now you do. Good luck!
h8e7211b4g76acg42c7ga537g03cbb1aeede7: We've met. She tried to kill me.
hd83206aag3afag4051g835agb5bcbd8ca98b: She what? Blood and rust, lady. What'd you do?
hf676b3f8g7c3ag44ccg80f8g18ce97144e99: She what? Blood and rust, mister. What'd you do?
hf9acc18cgce98g45efgb849g956d579c169a: You know what? Forget your junk. You got bigger problems if you pissed off Mol.
hc162e293ge0fcg465cgacbeg59f21cc06f59: Then I'll get my answers out of her.
h8967821bg813bg4020g9853gdb1d07f55445: If you're lying to me, I'll rip those horns off your adorable little head.
h8653e5d8gb8b7g4f87gab55g5f8adccd8cff: Look, whatever you think, take it up with Mol.
haef7c7ffg7547g4a74gad72gc6cfb5c0f90b: Crime rarely ends well, little one. Keep it in mind.
h689d9ae7g725fg4ea8ga199g4109d8d2813a: Careful. Not everyone is as forgiving as I am.
h6222d7eege93eg469bga6deg5b874fa60dd5: Mind where your little fingers wander, lest they find something that bites.
h295a73dbg00d8g4ee7g92a0g98ba2fe9112e: I'll keep my fingers to myself, thanks.
h2b0bacbdg7c88g4451g84ebg23446589cfd9: Find yourself another line of work. Second-rate pickpockets tend to lose their hands.
ha3fb090fg3bdfg427bgb463g7d3bedb214e3: I- look, mister, I don't want trouble.
h52052a47gd369g4fbdgaaf8gcb2404dcc1b5: I- look, lady, I don't want trouble.
hd184d681g64d8g4bbeg8f88g8abd57d05755: Just talk to Mol, okay? She's the one you need.
h14527a17gcb24g4c80g8035g8a6c66b947c3: If you have lied to me, I will feed you to spiders. One piece at a time.
h5d564c31g24c4g41fdgac62ga6573a04b160: Why should I trust a mere hatchling?
h5a63ff7cg7084g4793g876bg44e3b57ff189: If you have another choice, you go right ahead.
h8df0a119g7d18g4c7egbd0age4cc7792cb6a: Do I look like someone you want to steal from?
h7dca2db3g794bg49c7g88c6gedd5eaf6fe1c: A warning? Where I come from, thieves are punished - harshly.
h84d397acg179fg43e9gad55gda25eacbb2e1: Yeah? Are they bored to death?
h7d65c52egc8d8g4b75gaf3fg54541ac75056: I've been playing this game longer than you. I tend to win.
h2e9666f6g34dag4135gb059gd3ebb4763c3f: Yeah? Me too. And if you want your stuff back, you gotta talk to her.
h6369fd61g1338g4f18g9ac8g435d4855d1ab: Whoa. Hey. Can't say I've ever seen someone like you before.
h77317cf6gec3ag440cg8b7ag09ceea6d9a33: Hey! Jumbo! Wanna see something fun?
h2e84e7f6ga3adg40e9g9fb0gff64c9894c30: Oh. Hey. You're one of those drow, right?
he643fe0ag5bfcg48d1g9f69g0816336350f4: Hold out your hand, lady. Let me show you something.
hbc0c047bgf429g4468ga484g0b4468001fd2: Hold out your hand, mister. Let me show you something.
h1a47b429g656dg4330gb477gf0bf67a68d93: I heard stories about you. How you all live underground and steal kids away.
hb7c09008g06a0g4c0bga55cg34f543e234e0: Yes. Surface-dwellers tell all sorts of lies about us.
hb4f98a54g1ca7g480ag811bg6388a730a96c: Us too! No one says anything nice about tieflings.
ha7ffcb7fgfcc5g4058g828egf2203e8328b2: Here, want to see a trick?
h96b5214ag5c46g4fecgaea3g37e79108ef89: Uh... blood and rust. Someone stole the damn ring!
hec237935g5e29g445cg94d8g6c1be121f133: I might have had something to do with that.
hbed1a801gaf3bg43c0g90a9gad627e288cbe: You? You skimmed me? I was trying to skim you! Ahahaha!
he184498cg93ccg4977ga15ag42e09d686352: Keep the ring. No hard feelings. That was some sharp work, mate.
h1538111egc88dg4818g98bcgb8eb6cdd921a: But word to the wise? You should probably let my boss know you're working here.
h6008523bg4c37g4729g8a6dg964bb02b5921: You have a boss? Maybe I'll pay a visit.
hadcb4c69gc671g46cdg86c6gc7a4937da1fe: Good. Mol's office is through the crack in the wall over there.
h500f85a4g5796g45c4g8a44g8ac90ae89a56: Your funeral. Mol gets spicy when people leave her out of the know.
h54ab27c6g6241g4b57ga322gcbc54280afde: If you change your mind, she's through that crack in the wall over there. And lady?
hbdb72fe7g16aag4679g8a26g19f439fd3206: If you change your mind, she's through that crack in the wall over there. And mister?
h737f6068ge170g45aaga03ag04e07edb35c3: Is your boss part of the thieves' guild?
he5b76ca2g96f1g49e8gb687g046a1f097557: I mean- I don't think so?
h66c3c1aagbaadg4840g8f61g36cc77c95f7e: Look, just talk to Mol. She's through that crack in the wall. She'll tell you what's what.
ha5cb2e15g6493g43cbgac8fg7ef7fe0dec41: Nonsense! We kill far more children than we enslave.
he5ce9f01g6ba2g4aedg8dd6g7020cf0c9e94: ...Um, hey, would you like to see something fun?
h227b7a8bg246fg4b97gaea8g3db063fd28bb: You're thinking of the Lolth-sworn. Should you see a pair of red eyes? Run.
h51051fdfg16efg4806ga585gf79bacf5f8e2: I'm half-drow - I only steal half the children I meet.
h87d2c9e4g672dg4c86g8ff9gf326d15689c9: You some kind of elf or something?
h95ced8bbg04ceg4555g8533gac249462e169: Anyway, to business. Hold out your hand. I want to show you something.
h5ee49ca2g241ag4df4ga364g08ba7685fa65: Huh. Never heard of those. Guess I have now!
ha3f2770fg7468g4368gaf8eg3b61ac35c21e: What makes you think I'm an elf?
h5b59135fg445dg4e39g8591g54f12ed2ab0a: They look nice. You look nice. It was just a guess.
h5f9f8a6eg58ffg4d17gb8f3g2d90ff9d75c1: Go on. Take this ring. It's lucky.
hcf83a1abga610g47f5g8880g0efca9ffaa88: See? That's the kinda luck you get from just one of my lucky rings!
h622bf2f3ge4e8g41ccg9723g7e137734e1c8: I've got more where that came from. Real cheap, too. Interested?
h25ee4007g282fg45beg8813g0aca6df3a4c4: Hold on. One coin toss doesn't prove anything.
hdd1ea9a8ge5bcg42abg98c5g6496513c202a: Here. Take your ring back. I want to see your wares.
h5cacb14ag681fg4120gbc04gbfab009b39eb: I am indeed. I've got a free ring.
h7b3b0fa5g43acg4ed5g8305g9f0255bc642a: Not yet. Flip the coin again.
he471dfa1g1572g43fdgb825g7190ceed8dc4: You're killing me here, lady. You really are.
hc6045297gae73g4ad1g8d57g12a8944e3c73: You're killing me here, mister. You really are.
hc468d1b4g5cbeg450fg87b4ga5f61ea9348e: Just take the ring, huh? Free sample.
h3dcc8816g1eb0g461cg9d3ag13608979bfa8: Now, you wanna take a look at the other stuff I got? Or maybe you just wanna go.
hcc085a9cgcff4g494bgaec3ga8c77ae74f18: Let me see what you have.
h0fc68aebg08a6g44aagb003gc753a0008d92: *The metal is coarse and riddled with imperfections.*
hbedcf1b8g9b33g4914g8f19gf73b88e5a2d8: It's just a ring, mister. I know it's nothing special.
h06a455f5g5f5cg4b14ga187ga15376e07a3f: Now please. Please. Buy something or go.
he999224fg0a9bg405ag8238g16ae04ac7351: Lady, come on. Okay. Heads or tails?
hde51939aga0deg4f4ag9ee3gfefae905d914: Mister, come on. Okay. Heads or tails?
h5b37f373g1040g4697g935bg6282e6e158ea: Really? I mean... fine. Heads or tails?
hc52e5757g7e03g4993gbfa4g893abaa37ac7: The 'runes' on this ring are gibberish.
ha00c7386gac72g4500gb5ebgb2359e0116c5: Did you really think you could fool me?
hf5fa946eg2a15g4e90ga53agd206f94ff655: No thanks. Could I see your other wares?
ha542e901g6558g4decga087g6600069fc214: You bought something. Most everybody says it looks like junk and moves on.
hc58b416dg62deg4309g8b33gbff196284a30: I just wanted to support a young businessman.
hf9cfc491gafe8g4c4ega1c2g31702f3068a3: Oh, you have. You definitely have.
he8b7d019g48b8g4fb8g8759gdcafb29df410: Anyway, see you again sometime. Take care! Safe travels!
h7970f8f6gf624g407agb153g06c6381724d8: *You were robbed. And by the feel of your pack, not for the first time.*
h1a156115g3198g42b9g9a29g515f62dc500c: *As you turn to leave, you realise the other child does too. She looks nervous.*
hd25343b7g1c45g4bf4gaebbga4602bbb5926: *You spot the boy giving a sly wink as he turns away.*
h31319b6ag5932g4ac0ga00dg8717b432fdf0: It is junk. But the raw materials might be useful.
hb58c6b35g74c5g4152gb7bdg75ebbb4982be: Collecting junk is a hobby of mine.
h0b15a747g763dg4a0fg8b45gc586d789af53: Really. Good thing we met, then!
h8e76ede3g2eb2g4f00g89e7gf750a769788c: It's junk. That craftsmanship is downright offensive.
h0ec14b20g70b4g4c7cg98d0g742907494616: Not sure what you expected. I'm a kid living at the back of a cave.
h8f01a248gc165g4924g8b8cg7c53be06b646: Far be it from me to argue with that discerning eye of yours, sir.
hacf8a382g0010g4949g88f4g02a15f9774b8: Hey, hold on. You gotta pay for that!
h66ebfa76g3f08g44b8gac4bgb8de655ee3d8: Here. You can have it back. Now, what do you have for sale?
h84fdaacega57cg41d2gbb89gaedf0d098efc: You're getting paid in experience. The ring is mine now.
h352087b0g51fdg4e5dgb8adgbc84ddb717c0: Fine, keep it. Call it a sample, yeah?
h67090babg902dg4648ga6e2g46078ce6d25c: But you gotta at least look at the other rings, okay? I gotta eat.
h88611017g2e2ag4f7cg9d72ge4a688f25d6d: I don't have to do anything. Goodbye.
hf8136196g5febg49e6g80bbg46fdf9f19d76: You'll be sorry about this, scab. Count on it.
h19b7c136gbb19g410agac16gc20ad21ba910: I, uh, I don't know what you mean.
h189471adg44f2g445dga82ag8cd8ea5c9a6e: Come on. This is a Tinker's Trash scam. A clumsy one.
he92a3f47g591bg4039g989fg5aae6b20d345: Hey, that hurts. I'm running an honest ... okay, what's a Tinker's Trash?
hcba255bcga3efg4742ga72dg1c99e8ed02a9: It's when a scammer offers the target a 'magic' object...
he9ee57cegb9f4g464aga807ga5e0a5286339: ... then rigs a game to gain the target's trust and sell them trash.
hc5a5f73fg14e5g4f12gb3e3g695898aaff19: And I promise this isn't a Tinker's Trash scam.
h42421198g8317g4a03g8f56g288ce107907f: Fine. Take the ring. I just want to trade.
h20b50642g627fg449ega683g4d0312313b51: Then what kind of con is it?
hd309a9a8ge6aag42d2gbd4bg0629219ff607: Look, I swear to you. These rings are the real deal. I promise I'm not running a scam.
h46c74642g122eg489fga997g2d598a53164b: Actually, never mind. Just take your ring.
h7d678a9cg8602g4fdfg8c7cge49f9ae237d2: Take your ring. I don't have time for this.
h4d77ee2cga427g49efg890fg7d94ea36a7ef: Anyone could see this was a modified War Widow scam.
hef01dc0fg7906g4afega8cfge15dc25afc78: The hell it is. You can't do that one with rings. It has to be bracelets because...
h60988f81g278dg4867g93ffg1589231ae56d: Last chance. You want a look at my stuff or not?
h97ef039egdd41g43d0g9cf1g79b42c34eefb: Just take your ring and count yourself lucky.
hf234b112gc87fg4e20ga2e2g4fa4fd1b2d7e: No fooling you, is there? All right, get walking. Leave some room for the chumps, huh?
h1238f89eg35c2g4fcegbfafgce03d7cdf689: No - and I'm keeping the ring.
h568fabbbgfb69g4f1bgb9ebge683f4bd787e: Take your ring. I don't have time for this.
h1ccb6d1dgda60g44a9gb29eg4505da2e5ae4: This is no magic ring. The runes are gibberish.
hf6249bb5g919eg4939ga433g8d6216448c0d: You caught me, all right? They're not lucky rings.
hc65ae2cagd283g4e84gb75bg6936ef5bf74f: I'm just... trying to earn money for my family. My father left and my mother... she's so sick.
h94554688g3330g4611gbc49ga23b7b31c93c: I wish I had better things to sell than... trinkets, but it's all I have!
he71d7858ge95cg4a07g83afg0b0b18c9f1cd: All right, take your ring. What do you have to trade?
h39c71767g97d3g461ag94cdg4413587aa952: Thank you. That... means so much.
h701ec0a0g222eg4f68ga0c0g0471c325d409: Hey, hold on. You gotta pay for that!
h37d6ec96g33dcg48e8gbe50g3b3edb7743f9: It's only a joke. Go on - flip your coin.
h71294755g23aeg45f7ga94fg544d0f1940bf: Real sweet sense of humour you got there, chum.
h107b25f0g0272g4a50g97e5g9a68af99e813: Anyways, you gotta call before the flip. Heads or tails?
hb8875630g78a8g4b35gb606g6330e3390e29: Uh. I never learned names or anything. Just the tricks.
ha033142bg6ce9g4d21gafe0gb4d07d9b33da: Anyway, forget that. Take the ring! I wanna show you how lucky it is!
h047da779g063fg46f0ga8f1g50ec6ef216d0: Vanish the ring with a reverse Hammar's Flourish.
h01bb190dg50e5g45f7ga499g64984fd7480a: Okay, maybe you don't need extra luck. But since you're already holding the thing...
h7cbb25e1g3ee0g4389ga9fag9fa1ab94986e: Hard luck, lady. But like I said, we can change that. Watch!
h0a009792g9e1fg4378g9058g3202dc164fff: Hard luck, mister. But like I said, we can change that. Watch!
h4740dee9ga8b5g4545ga27agf0eba9da5377: I've no time for a scam. Bye, kid.
h31162c3dg50e0g471ag8631g2efd21184aae: You haven't seen anything yet, lady!
h7b472447g8997g4617g8fdfgfc0094d681b3: You haven't seen anything yet, mister!
hf172b1e1g9bb8g4477ga59egb5fc9fb6e6e9: Go on! Take the ring and watch your fortune change!
hc2fea1c4gf7deg483cg9c3ag365374e63e75: Hey there. You wanna buy one of my lucky rings? Bargain magic at good prices.
h5fd16916ge355g44b9g9e14g45c7a281610b: I don't have your ring. It vanished.
h63ee60f2gd1d5g40c5g9286gc7b40b0327e9: That a fact? Well, they're magical rings. Maybe it vanished, y'know, magic'ly.
h3d24662cg4599g49f6g9705g85f823d51539: Good news is, I got more on sale. Interested?
h33504c28g4a90g4939gb875g6b9f666b0d3b: That's not how magic rings work.
h85f87a00g43feg4835g9c23ge91e86b6c51c: Maybe it's how this one worked?
h31f906f4gbf40g4329g875eg43d53eb8bccb: Look, do you want to buy something or nothing?
h212824c0g98d1g4603g810cg831c4923665a: Well, what you think? Good stuff, right?
hd7c9bfe1g6f49g415fg8ff1g100c3bff8c87: Well, thanks for the honesty, I guess.
hc049d77eg3970g4e16gb801gaf3e92787cdf: Sorry to hear that. Keep checking back!
h1f61b081gdef6g449fg9ccbgf334f0ac817f: *You were robbed. And by the feel of your pack, not for the first time.*
he4907b62gef32g4949ga822g5c01ef2f9b64: *As you turn to leave, you realise the other child does too. She looked nervous.*
hbf0ea001g4700g4c2fgbee6g786fa61a3398: Could be worth something if I had a furnace to melt it down.
hd71c2c8eg9c1fg4dd1g93ebg332d1dea506f: *You spot the boy giving a sly wink as he turns away.*
h98cda0f9gcbd8g4462gba4egb96183d739a5: Hey, you're back! Look to buy, sell, or what?
